subcodes.first_line: As to what thou didst ask concerning the blessed verse in the Qur'án, "And verily We made a covenant with Adam," unto the end, God had taken a covenant from Adam [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و امّا ما سئلت عن الآية المبارکه فی القرآن و لقد عهدنا الی آدم الی آخر قد اخذ اللّه العهد عن آدم
subcodes.subjects: @Adam; Adam and Eve, @praise and encouragement, @symbolism, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
